name: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management Readiness
description: Assess whether quality and operations staff understand ISO 9001:2015 requirements before an audit or certification renewal. Focus areas include process approach, risk-based thinking, documented information requirements, internal audit procedures, corrective action processes, and management review obligations. Participants should demonstrate practical judgment on non-conformance handling and continual improvement cycles.
targetAudience: Quality managers, operations supervisors, production staff
